label: Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms

node.label: Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms
node.definition: Signals are transformed into frequency or basis domains where global structure can be modeled efficiently.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Fourier, wavelet & spectral transforms is modeled as depending on Signal processing & harmonic analysis, Linear algebra and feeding downstream nodes such as Structured state-space models (S4 family), Neural operators, FNOs & PINNs.

limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Signal processing & harmonic analysis, Linear algebra.
